name: split-text
description: A scroll-triggered text splitting animation using GSAP SplitText.

name: split-lines
description: A scroll-triggered line-by-line reveal animation using GSAP SplitText with overflow masking.

name: text-opacity
description: A scroll-scrubbed letter-by-letter opacity animation using GSAP ScrollTrigger.

name: flip-text
description: A hover-triggered letter flip animation using GSAP where letters roll up and are replaced from below.

name: flip-loader
description: A looping letter flip animation using GSAP timeline, ideal for loaders and marquees.
